case_title: ABDOLLAH POURSAFAR VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED MAY-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF ABDOLLAH POURSAFAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TRICIA PEARSE-WILLIAMS CLAIMS. PARTIES CAME TO A STIPULATED JUDGMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO TRIAL. HONORABLE ANDREA MCGARY ALLOWED THE STIPULATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,482.00 FILED BY POURSAFAR, ABDOLLAH AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY POURSAFAR, ABDOLLAH CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POURSAFAR, ABDOLLAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $6,897.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,012.00, PURSUANT TO PARTY STIPULATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
